payload.title: Tenant isolation via Postgres RLS + app-layer scoping
payload.description: Enable RLS on every tenant-scoped table keyed on a tenant_id session GUC set from the authenticated claim (claim shape owned by SCP-122). Add a defense-in-depth app-layer tenant_id filter so a missing GUC fails closed. Test cross-tenant reads/writes are impossible even via raw SQL and even if the app forgets to scope a query. (From SCP-124, AMENDMENT 2.)
